title: QIAseq Targeted RNAscan Panel for Illumina Instruments
author: Opentrons
materials: Remove previous reagents and place the ligation mix in A1 of slot 5.

This protocol automates the QIAseq Targeted RNAscan Panel for Illumina Instruments protocol in the [QIAseq Targeted RNAscan Panel](https://www.qiagen.com/pt/products/discovery-and-translational-research/next-generation-sequencing/rna-sequencing/rna-fusions/qiaseq-targeted-rnascan-panel/?clear=true#orderinginformation) on the OT-2. The QIAseq Targeted RNAscan Panels are a complete Sample to Insight solution that applies the molecular barcode-based digital RNA sequencing strategy to quantify known and new fusion genes. Explanation of complex parameters below: * `Number of Samples`: The total number of DNA samples. Samples must range between 1 (minimum) and 12 (maximum). * `Samples Labware Type`: The starting samples can be placed in either 1.5 mL tubes on the Opentrons Tube Rack OR in a 96 Well Plate. * `P300 Single GEN2 Pipette Mount Position`: The position of the pipette, either left or right. * `P20 Single GEN2 Pipette Mount Position`: The position of the pipette, either left or right. * `IL-N7 Adapter Row`: Choose the row the adapters will be used from either Plates A, B, C, or D. * `Magnetic Module Engage Height`: The height the magnets will raise on the magnetic module. * `Wash 1 Bead Volume`: Choose the bead volume based on RNA quality. * `Wash 2 Bead Volume`: Choose the bead volume based on RNA quality (This value is used for all subsequent bead washes). ---
Pre-Heat Thermocycler to 65°C with lid at 103°C.
Pause and briefly centrifuge the plate and then place into the thermocycler. Click Resume to continue.
Completely remove residual supernatant with the P20 pipette.
Delay for 10 minutes to dry beads.
Pause and **manually** add SPE Reaction Mix to each sample and then place the PCR plate in the thermocycler. Click Resume when ready.
**Manually** add the Universal PCR mix to the samples on the PCR plate. Then place plate in the thermocycler.
Delay for 5 minutes for solution to clear
Protocol Completed! Proceed to library quantification.

steps.title: Transfer 5 uL of RNA to...
steps.instruction: Transfer 5 uL of RNA to PCR Plate on Temperature Module

steps.title: Add 1 uL of RP Primer...
steps.instruction: Add 1 uL of RP Primer to Samples on PCR Plate

steps.title: Mix by pipetting 7 times and...
steps.instruction: Mix by pipetting 7 times and then pause protocol to centrifuge briefly.

steps.title: Place PCR plate in Thermocycler and click Resume
steps.instruction: Place PCR plate in Thermocycler and click Resume.

steps.title: Incubate at 65°C for 5 minutes...
steps.instruction: Incubate at 65°C for 5 minutes and then place on temperature module for 2 minutes.

steps.title: Briefly centrifuge and return plate to the temperature module
steps.instruction: Briefly centrifuge and return plate to the temperature module.

steps.title: Remove RP Primer tube and replace...
steps.instruction: Remove RP Primer tube and replace with First Strand Synthesis Mix. Add 4 uL of First Strand Synthesis Mix

steps.title: Mix by pipetting 7 times and...
steps.instruction: Mix by pipetting 7 times and then pause protocol to centrifuge briefly.

steps.title: Place PCR plate into the thermocycler and click resume
steps.instruction: Place PCR plate into the thermocycler and click resume.

steps.title: Incubate with the following parameters
steps.instruction: Incubate with the following parameters: 25°C for 10 minutes, 42°C for 30 minutes, 70°C for 15 minutes, then hold at 4°C.

steps.title: Remove place for thermocycler, briefly centrifuge...
steps.instruction: Remove place for thermocycler, briefly centrifuge and return plate to the temperature module.

steps.title: Remove First Strand Synthesis Mix and...
steps.instruction: Remove First Strand Synthesis Mix and replace with Second Strand Synthesis Mix.

steps.title: Add 10 uL of Second Strand Synthesis Mix to samples
steps.instruction: Add 10 uL of Second Strand Synthesis Mix to samples.

steps.title: Mix by pipetting 7 times and...
steps.instruction: Mix by pipetting 7 times and then pause protocol to centrifuge briefly.

steps.title: Place PCR plate into the thermocycler and click resume
steps.instruction: Place PCR plate into the thermocycler and click resume.

steps.title: Incubate with the following parameters
steps.instruction: Incubate with the following parameters: 37°C for 7 minutes, 65°C for 10 minutes, 80°C for 10 minutes, then hold at 4°C.

steps.title: Remove PCR plate from thermocycler, briefly...
steps.instruction: Remove PCR plate from thermocycler, briefly centrifuge and then replace on the temperature module.

steps.title: Remove the second strange synthesis mix...
steps.instruction: Remove the second strange synthesis mix tube and replace with End repair/dA tailing mix in position A1 of slot 5. Also place the ERA enzyme tube in position B1.

steps.title: Cool thermocycler to 4°C and set lid temperature to 70°C
steps.instruction: Cool thermocycler to 4°C and set lid temperature to 70°C.

steps.title: Add 20 uL of End repair/dA tailing mix to samples
steps.instruction: Add 20 uL of End repair/dA tailing mix to samples.

steps.title: Add 10 uL of ERA Enzyme to the samples
steps.instruction: Add 10 uL of ERA Enzyme to the samples.

steps.title: Incubate with the following parameters
steps.instruction: Incubate with the following parameters: 4°C for 1 minute, 20°C for 30 minutes, 65°C for 30 minutes, then hold at 4°C.

steps.title: Remove plate from thermocycler and place on the temperature module
steps.instruction: Remove plate from thermocycler and place on the temperature module.

steps.title: Place the IL-N7 adapter plate in Slot 2
steps.instruction: Place the IL-N7 adapter plate in Slot 2. Then click Resume.

steps.title: Transfer 5 uL of IL-N7 adapter...
steps.instruction: Transfer 5 uL of IL-N7 adapter with molecular tags to each PCR well with 50 uL of reaction mixture.

steps.title: Add 45 uL of ligation mix...
steps.instruction: Add 45 uL of ligation mix to each sample and mix thoroughly.

steps.title: Incubate the ligation reaction at 20°C...
steps.instruction: Incubate the ligation reaction at 20°C for 15 minutes with the lid open.

steps.title: Remove the PCR plate from the...
steps.instruction: Remove the PCR plate from the thermocycler and place it on the temperature module. Place a new NEST 96 Well Deep well plate on the Magnetic Module (Mag Plate).

steps.title: Place a NEST 12 well reservoir...
steps.instruction: Place a NEST 12 well reservoir containing Ethanol (A1) and nuclease-free water (A12) in Slot 2. Place QIAseq Beads in Slot 5 position A1.

steps.title: Transfer 100 uL of Reaction Product to Mag Plate
steps.instruction: Transfer 100 uL of Reaction Product to Mag Plate

steps.title: Perform bead wash and mix thoroughly by pipetting 10 times
steps.instruction: Perform bead wash and mix thoroughly by pipetting 10 times.

steps.title: Incubate for 5 min at room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate for 5 min at room temperature.

steps.title: Engage magnetic module for 15 minutes and then remove supernantant
steps.instruction: Engage magnetic module for 15 minutes and then remove supernantant.

steps.title: Perform an ethanol wash with 260 uL
steps.instruction: Perform an ethanol wash with 260 uL.

steps.title: Remove supernatant completely
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant completely.

steps.title: Repeat steps 39 and 40
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 39 and 40.

steps.title: Add 52 uL of Nuclease-Free Water to Elute DNA
steps.instruction: Add 52 uL of Nuclease-Free Water to Elute DNA

steps.title: Engage magnetic module for 5 minutes to separate the beads
steps.instruction: Engage magnetic module for 5 minutes to separate the beads.

steps.title: Place a new NEST 96 Well...
steps.instruction: Place a new NEST 96 Well Deep well plate in slot 4 (intermediate plate). Ensure there is enough volume of QIAseq beads.

steps.title: Transfer 50 uL of sample to new intermediate plate
steps.instruction: Transfer 50 uL of sample to new intermediate plate.

steps.title: Perform bead wash and mix thoroughly by pipetting 10 times
steps.instruction: Perform bead wash and mix thoroughly by pipetting 10 times.

steps.title: Incubate for 5 min at room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate for 5 min at room temperature.

steps.title: Remove old Mag Plate and place...
steps.instruction: Remove old Mag Plate and place the new Intermediate plate on the magnetic module. The intermediate plate will now be referred to as the Mag Plate.

steps.title: Engage magnetic module for 10 minutes to separate beads
steps.instruction: Engage magnetic module for 10 minutes to separate beads.

steps.title: Remove and discard supernatant
steps.instruction: Remove and discard supernatant.

steps.title: Perform a 200 uL ethanol wash...
steps.instruction: Perform a 200 uL ethanol wash and remove and discard supernatant.

steps.title: Repeat step 52
steps.instruction: Repeat step 52.

steps.title: Dry beads for 5 minutes while magnets are engaged
steps.instruction: Dry beads for 5 minutes while magnets are engaged.

steps.title: Add 12
steps.instruction: Add 12.4 uL of Nuclease-Free Water to Elute DNA

steps.title: Please remove the old PCR plate...
steps.instruction: Please remove the old PCR plate on the temperature module and place a new PCR plate. Then click Resume to continue.

steps.title: Transfer 10
steps.instruction: Transfer 10.4 uL of supernatant to new PCR plate.

steps.title: Incubate with the following parameters
steps.instruction: Incubate with the following parameters: 95°C for 15 minutes, 95°C for 15 seconds and 68°C for 10 minutes (8 cycles), 72°C for 5 minutes, then hold at 4°C.

steps.title: Remove the PCR plate from the...
steps.instruction: Remove the PCR plate from the thermocycler and place on temperature module.

steps.title: Place a new deep well plate onto the magnetic module
steps.instruction: Place a new deep well plate onto the magnetic module.

steps.title: Add 30 uL of nuclease free...
steps.instruction: Add 30 uL of nuclease free water to bring volume to 50 uL.

steps.title: Transfer samples to new mag plate
steps.instruction: Transfer samples to new mag plate.

steps.title: Perform bead wash and mix thoroughly by pipetting 10 times
steps.instruction: Perform bead wash and mix thoroughly by pipetting 10 times.

steps.title: Incubate for 5 min at room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate for 5 min at room temperature.

steps.title: Engage magnetic module for 5 minutes and remove supernatant
steps.instruction: Engage magnetic module for 5 minutes and remove supernatant.

steps.title: Perform a 200 uL ethanol wash and remove supernatant
steps.instruction: Perform a 200 uL ethanol wash and remove supernatant.

steps.title: Repeat step 68
steps.instruction: Repeat step 68.

steps.title: Dry beads for 5 minutes while magnets are engaged
steps.instruction: Dry beads for 5 minutes while magnets are engaged.

steps.title: Add 15
steps.instruction: Add 15.4 uL of Nuclease-Free Water to Elute DNA.

steps.title: Place a new PCR plate on the temperature module
steps.instruction: Place a new PCR plate on the temperature module.

steps.title: Transfer 13
steps.instruction: Transfer 13.4 uL of Supernatant to PCR Plate.

steps.title: Incubate with the following parameters
steps.instruction: Incubate with the following parameters: 95°C for 15 minutes, 95°C for 15 seconds and 60°C for 2 minutes (25 cycles), 72°C for 5 minutes, then hold at 4°C.

steps.title: Remove PCR plate from thermocycler and...
steps.instruction: Remove PCR plate from thermocycler and plate on the temperature module.

steps.title: Place a new deep well plate on the magnetic module
steps.instruction: Place a new deep well plate on the magnetic module. Ensure ethanol and QIAseq bead volumes are adequate for cleanup.

steps.title: Add 30 uL of nuclease free...
steps.instruction: Add 30 uL of nuclease free water to bring volume to 50 uL.

steps.title: Transfer samples to new mag plate
steps.instruction: Transfer samples to new mag plate.

steps.title: Perform bead wash and mix thoroughly by pipetting 10 times
steps.instruction: Perform bead wash and mix thoroughly by pipetting 10 times.

steps.title: Incubate for 5 min at room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate for 5 min at room temperature.

steps.title: Engage magnetic module for 5 minutes and remove supernatant
steps.instruction: Engage magnetic module for 5 minutes and remove supernatant.

steps.title: Perform a 200 uL ethanol wash and remove supernatant
steps.instruction: Perform a 200 uL ethanol wash and remove supernatant.

steps.title: Repeat step 68
steps.instruction: Repeat step 68.

steps.title: Dry beads for 5 minutes while magnets are engaged
steps.instruction: Dry beads for 5 minutes while magnets are engaged.

steps.title: Add 25 uL of Nuclease-Free Water to Elute DNA
steps.instruction: Add 25 uL of Nuclease-Free Water to Elute DNA.

steps.title: Place a new PCR plate on the temperature module
steps.instruction: Place a new PCR plate on the temperature module.

steps.title: Transfer 21 uL of Supernatant to PCR Plate
steps.instruction: Transfer 21 uL of Supernatant to PCR Plate.
